title: What Is AI Pair Programming? AI Coding Tools for Developers
summary: IBM Technology explains AI pair programming as a collaborative approach where AI assists developers in coding tasks. The content highlights how AI enhances debugging, code review, and overall developer productivity through real-world applications.
writeup: This IBM Technology video defines AI pair programming as a collaborative model in which AI assists developers across coding tasks rather than replacing them. It matters because it situates AI coding tools within established development workflows: debugging, code review, and code generation. The concrete takeaways are how AI supports debugging, contributes to code review, and lifts overall developer productivity, illustrated through real-world applications.
